summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zero-Trust Licensing & Compliance Layer. All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). All 8 frontend compliance sub-tabs render correctly and form submissions work with proper API integration. Fixed minor bug in date parsing for minor detection.

minor.issue: Date parsing failed for simple date format (YYYY-MM-DD) without timezone - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: AI fallback to rule-based system is working correctly when Emergent LLM key budget is exceeded
All compliance endpoints properly log to audit trail
Hash chain integrity verification is implemented for immutable audit logs
updated_files: /app/backend/zero_trust_compliance_engine.py - Fixed date parsing for minor detection
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zero-Trust Compliance Layer is fully functional. Access via /enterprise route, click Compliance tab. All 8 sub-tabs work: Overview, Release Verification, Identity Verification, Usage Rights, Fraud Detection, Privacy Compliance, Audit Trail, License Expiry. AI is using rule-based fallback due to budget limits - this is expected behavior.

frontend_ui_tests.release_verification_tab: PASS - Form renders and submits correctly
frontend_ui_tests.identity_verification_tab: PASS - Form renders and submits correctly
frontend_ui_tests.usage_rights_tab: PASS - Form renders and submits correctly
frontend_ui_tests.fraud_detection_tab: PASS - Form renders and submits correctly
frontend_ui_tests.privacy_compliance_tab: PASS - Form with region selection works

release_verification_form.result: Status: VERIFIED with proper consent checkmarks and issues list

identity_verification_form.result: Status: VERIFIED with age verification and expiry date

usage_rights_form.result: Status: COMPLIANT with allowed/restricted uses and territories

fraud_detection_form.result: Risk Level: MEDIUM (correctly flagged zero-size file)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Date parsing for date_of_birth failed for simple YYYY-MM-DD format
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added handling for simple date format without timezone using strptime

ai_fallback_note: The compliance engine is using rule-based fallback because AI (Emergent LLM) is unavailable due to budget limits. This is expected behavior and all compliance checks work correctly with rule-based logic.
